items.desc_en: A refreshing and nourishing soup base slow-simmered with coconut water, herbs, and tender chicken. Naturally sweet, aromatic, and comforting in every sip.
items.desc_zh: 以椰子水融合藥材慢熬，湯底清甜回甘，帶有淡淡藥材香氣。搭配鮮嫩雞肉，入口溫潤滋補，清爽不膩，是適合一家大小共享的養生湯底。

items.desc_en: Eight premium herbs in slow-cooked pork bone stock. Gentle, restorative, and deeply nourishing.
items.desc_zh: 八種上等藥材，慢熬豬骨湯。清淡滋補，養身暖心。

items.desc_en: Sun-ripened tomatoes melted into a creamy, sweet broth. Beloved by those who want comfort over fire.
items.desc_zh: 熟透番茄融入奶白湯底，香甜濃郁。不嗜辣者的首選。
